ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property in thousands of dollars */,
  "acres" REAL /* Size of the property in acres */,
  "size_sqft" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the property in years */,
  "rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the property */,
  "baths" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "garages" INTEGER /* Number of garages in the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "virtual_tour_url" TEXT /* URL for a virtual tour of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo, townhouse) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system (e.g., central, baseboard) */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system (e.g., central air, window units) */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities (e.g., pool, gym, garden) */,
  "hoa_fees" REAL /* Homeowner's association fees */,
  "hoa_fees_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of HOA fees (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing agent */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, under contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL for a thumbnail version of the image */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the primary image for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., detail, summary) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the property (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the view (e.g., website, mobile app, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, broker, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the agent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the agent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker the agent works for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the broker */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the broker's company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the broker's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the broker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brokers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being inquired about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_text" TEXT /* Text of the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_inquiries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_inquiries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being offered on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the offer */,
  "offer_amount" REAL /* Amount of the offer in thousands of dollars */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date when the offer was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., accepted, rejected, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_offers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_offers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
